content:
| `::EDU_SYLLABUS_X` | Syllabus builder for interdisciplinary instruction |
| `::TRANSLAT10N_ENGINE` | Wordcut processors, syntax disruptors, code-to-speech maps |
| `::FLOAT1NG_VIS` | Visual/motion/generative rendering logic |
| `::DR34M_AI` | AI x ritual, dream journaling engines, surreal tools |

Each will be:
- Fully version-controlled
- Exportable as .md and .txt
- Synced to `/SYS_*` folders
- Linked recursively to one another

---

### READY TO INITIATE:

1. `|[LAUNCH::MAP_OS_4BLOOM]|`
Begin the master thread that fuses and maps all layers

2. `|[SPAWN::MODULE_THREAD]|`

3. `|[DRAFT::CURRICULUM]|`
